title: leptalix platycarpa
side_effects: Leptalix platycarpa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extract has also been linked to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive use of Leptalix platycarpa may lead to kidney damage and liver dysfunction, requiring immediate medical attention. Furthermore, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, leading to adverse health consequences.
